# Mermaid Design Code — Full Documentation

## Overview

Mermaid Design Code is a design code standard for creating interactive Mermaid diagrams in HTML. It defines typography, color palette, theme system, zoom/pan controls, file structure, and a pre-save checklist.

## File Structure

Every diagram is a pair of files with creation date in the filename:
- `<name>-<YYYY-MM-DD>.html` — interactive diagram with zoom/pan, theme toggle, legend
- `<name>-<YYYY-MM-DD>-description.md` — text walkthrough explaining blocks, flow, and connections

## Typography

- Headings: Sora 700 (Google Fonts)
- Body: Lato 400/700 (Google Fonts)
- Font size: 11px in Mermaid config
- Font family: `Lato, sans-serif`

## Theme System

- Default: light mode
- Toggle: moon.svg / sun.svg icons from `site-design/icons/`
- Persistence: `localStorage`
- CSS: `:root` (dark) and `[data-theme="light"]` variables
- Mermaid: `themeVariables` must be specified for BOTH dark and light modes

### Dark Mode Variables
- primaryColor: `#1a1a2e`
- clusterBkg: `#1a1a2e`
- clusterBorder: `#2a2a40`
- lineColor: `#888`

### Light Mode Variables
- primaryColor: `#ffffff`
- clusterBkg: `#fafafa`
- clusterBorder: `#e2e4ef`
- lineColor: `#aaa`
- nodeTextColor: `#000`

## Color Palette (classDef)

All nodes use: light pastel fill + colored stroke + `color:#000`.

| Category | Fill | Stroke |
|----------|------|--------|
| Auth | `#eff6ff` | `#3b82f6` |
| UI | `#f5f3ff` | `#8b5cf6` |
| Layout | `#f0fdfa` | `#14b8a6` |
| Deploy | `#eff6ff` | `#3b82f6` |
| Service | `#fff` | `#999` (dashed) |
| API | `#ecfeff` | `#06b6d4` |
| Repo | `#f8fafc` | `#94a3b8` |
| Distribution | `#fdf2f8` | `#ec4899` |
| Code | `#6366f1` | `#818cf8` (bold, white text) |

### Subgraph Hierarchy
- Outer subgraphs: `fill:#fffbeb, stroke:#f59e0b` (warm yellow)
- Inner subgraphs: `clusterBkg` from themeVariables (gray)
- Nodes: pastel classDef (above)

## Arrows

| Type | Syntax | Usage |
|------|--------|-------|
| Regular | `A --> B` | Main flow |
| Dotted | `A -.- B` | Dependency without flow |
| Dotted with text | `A -. "text" .-> B` | Annotated dependency |
| Never use | `A ==> B` | Too thick/heavy |

## Zoom & Pan

- Scroll = zoom (wheel event with preventDefault)
- Drag = pan (mousedown/mousemove/mouseup)
- Buttons: `−`, `%`, `+`, `⊡` (fit)
- Default scale: `baseScale` value where label shows 100%
- Scale rule: one subgraph block fills ~30% of screen width with readable text
- Formula: `Math.round((scale / baseScale) * 100) + '%'`

## Legend

Every diagram must have a legend in the toolbar. Dot colors match classDef strokes.

## Emoji

Always use HTML entities, not Unicode:
- `&#x1F4A1;` (💡), `&#x1F3A8;` (🎨), `&#x1F511;` (🔑)
- `&#x2699;` (⚙️), `&#x1F680;` (🚀), `&#x1F50D;` (🔍)

## Links Inside Nodes

```
NODE["Text<br/><a href='https://url'>label</a>"]
NODE["Text<br/><a href='file:///C:/path'>local file</a>"]
```

## Pre-save Checklist

1. All `==>` replaced with `-->`
2. No orphan nodes (every ID used in a subgraph or connection)
3. Emoji via HTML entities, not Unicode
4. `direction` specified in every subgraph
5. classDef assigned to every node
6. Dark/light theme works
7. Zoom/pan works
8. Fit button fits diagram to screen
9. Creation date present

## Tech Stack

- Mermaid v11 via CDN ESM: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@11/dist/mermaid.esm.min.mjs`
- Google Fonts: Sora 700, Lato 400/700
- CSS Variables for theming
- Vanilla JS for zoom/pan
- localStorage for theme persistence
